config.unmet-npc.name: Allow Unmet NPC Customers
config.unmet-npc.desc: When enabled, NPC you haven't met are allowed to come visit your shop (this doesn't count as meeting them).
config.haggle-autoclick.name: Haggle Auto-click
config.haggle-autoclick.desc: When enabled, haggling automatically completes with a lower price (same as using right-click or cancel button).
config.haggle-speed.name: Haggle Speed
config.haggle-speed.desc: Set the speed of the haggle minigame.
config.haggle-ui-offset.name: Haggle UI Offset
config.haggle-ui-offset.desc: Comma separated haggle UI offset coordinates
